subcodes.first_line: May my spirit and heart be a sacrifice unto thee! Though it hath been long since this servant hath been enabled to reply to thy noble letter [3.5s]... ...And now concerning the extensive commentary on the Islamic tradition which begins, “I was a hidden treasure
subcodes.first_line_orig: فداک روحی و قلبی اگرچه مدتهاست که این عبد موفق بر جواب رقیمه کریمه حضرت عالی
subcodes.subjects: @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @law of inheritance, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @unity; oneness of humanity
